dt-example.title: Initialisation examples
dt-example.info:
Spreadsheets such as Excel and Google Docs have a very handy data duplication option of an auto fill tool. The AutoFill library for DataTables provides a similar interface for DataTables (even extending upon it to provide complex data interaction options). AutoFill also provides full support for [Editor](https://editor.datatables.net) allowing end users to update data very quickly.
The examples in this section show how AutoFill can be used with DataTables.
